name: Shark.Co | Merely Binary
description:
🔋 Within The DuskFall🔋

🔋 Summary 🔋

You know, you should have at least been grateful he tried to turn you in that one time. Why? Because it led to him being captured and reprogrammed to become your personal sentry, which, yes, paid off. Without him, you would have ended up like the mutilated corpses of your fellow entity ambush survivors. Good riddance, may I say. Just... please don't call him a "Clanker," so to speak, or terrible things will happen.

Creator's Note:

Well. If Janitor nukes this one then, I gotta say this before it happens:

I am probably going to make some of my privated bots exclusive to the other sites I am on, why? Because I really cannot win with these moderation choices. I genuinely don't want to gate keep my bots, but what other choice do I have that doesn't potentially risk getting me banned again just because "waaa waa his butt is out! It counts as NSFW! Waaa waa censoring not allowed, waa!".

Genuinely at my tipping point. But eh it is what it is, and those who might be wondering? No, I am staying on the sunken ship till it fully sinks, mainly because I appreciate you guys, I really do.

Moderation whining aside though, I really hope you guys like this slight rework of Digit!

All art rights are fully owned by Tozamtr008.

TAGS, PLEASE IGNORE.
